summary: Add backoff ceiling config for restore coordinator retries
description: withRetry in src/util/backoff.ts hardcodes maxMs at 10 seconds for every caller. During the eu-west slowdown covered in HEL-530, we wanted a higher ceiling for restore specifically without changing the default for every other caller of backoff.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: withRetry already accepts a partial options override per call, so the restore coordinator just needs to pass a higher maxMs explicitly instead of relying on the default. Making it configurable via env var too so on-call can bump it without a code change during an incident.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: confirmed this would have made the HEL-530 mitigation a config change instead of a code deploy, good improvement

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Shipped HELIOS_RESTORE_BACKOFF_CEILING_MS, defaults to the existing 10 second behavior, restore coordinator reads it and passes it through to withRetry. Resolving.
